plain_message: CRM contact fields containing personal data must be encrypted at rest. Add field-level encryption before storing phone numbers, emails, or addresses.
Sending contact or lead data to a third-party service requires consent and a Data Processing Agreement. Verify the recipient is GDPR-compliant before transmitting.
Revenue, quota, and deal value data must not be written to application logs. This data is confidential and can expose competitive intelligence.
CRM tables storing contact and lead data should have a defined retention schedule. GDPR requires deleting contact data when the processing purpose expires. Add a purge mechanism.
Hardcoded CRM API key (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive) detected. Move this to an environment variable or secrets manager immediately.
Bulk email sending without checking opt-in consent violates CAN-SPAM and GDPR. Ensure you have explicit consent or a legitimate interest basis before sending.
